query: SELECT ticker, COUNT(*) as tradeCount, SUM(realizedPnl) as totalPnl, AVG(holdTimeMinutes) as avgHoldMin, GROUP_CONCAT(exitReason ORDER BY closedAt SEPARATOR ',') as reasons FROM paperTrades WHERE sessionId = 25 GROUP BY ticker ORDER BY tradeCount DESC LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2fRMU9WuDe4UzGh.6d94b4c6929d --database MmWmJbH77mYYXTZazVYpbM --execute SELECT ticker, COUNT(*) as tradeCount, SUM(realizedPnl) as totalPnl, AVG(holdTimeMinutes) as avgHoldMin, GROUP_CONCAT(exitReason ORDER BY closedAt SEPARATOR ',') as reasons FROM paperTrades WHERE sessionId = 25 GROUP BY ticker ORDER BY tradeCount DESC LIMIT 20;
